subject: New Assignment: Microservices Engineer – Java – E-commerce
body:
Hi there,

I wanted to share an exciting opportunity that just came in from Shopgrid, a company in the e-commerce space.

They are scaling their engineering team and are looking for a Microservices Engineer to join on a contract basis.

What they're looking for:
• Java
• GCP
• Docker
• Oracle
• Pinecone

Practical details:
• Start: 2025-03-20
• Duration: 6 months
• Location: Stockholm (hybrid)
• Rate: up to 1050 SEK/h

If this sounds like a fit, or you know someone who might be – reach out!

Best regards,
Therese Magnusson
Staffing Coordinator
Staffbridge Nordic
Tel: +46 76 344 56 78
